name: standard-webmail-api-migration
title: Standard Webmail API Migration
description: Test-first phased migration from desktop-shaped JSON-RPC to standard single-user self-hosted Webmail: REST /api layer (80+ endpoints across 18 resource groups + 7 composite endpoints), Cookie-based auth with bcrypt password hash, browser-native attachments (FormData upload + streaming download with preview), desktop shell removal, OpenAPI docs, server/ rename. 25 architecture decisions confirmed via grill-me deep-dive. ~15 days estimated.
creator: clionertr
notes: Final Webmail migration completed. Pebble now uses React SPA + Rust REST API + SSE with cookie auth. Frontend production code uses api-client/api.ts and sse-client only; /rpc is not exposed by backend, Vite, or nginx. Tauri/desktop shell hooks, desktop notification-open path, desktop package CI, and Tauri build scripts were removed. README, deploy config, OpenAPI docs, and Trellis specs were synchronized. Final gate commands are recorded in remaining-plan.md.

decisions.auth: bcrypt hash in .env, cookie-based session, 7-day expiry, HttpOnly+Secure+SameSite=Strict
decisions.login: frontend React component, simple rate limiting (5 failures → 15min lock)
decisions.attachments: FormData upload, streaming download with preview
decisions.sse: cookie auth (EventSource), delete app:open-mailto and mail:notification-open, keep mail sync/status events
decisions.tests: Rust integration tests + vitest, all green per phase

steps: 1. WRITE: 编写该阶段所有测试用例，确保覆盖正常路径 + 边界条件 + 错误场景
2. VERIFY_RED: 运行测试，确认测试失败（红）— 证明测试有效
3. IMPLEMENT: 实现功能代码，最小化改动，复用现有 rpc/* 函数
4. VERIFY_GREEN: 运行测试，确认全部通过（绿）— 不通过则回到步骤3修复
5. CHECK: 运行 trellis-check 质量检查（lint + type-check + 跨层一致性）
6. REPORT: 向用户总结本阶段 — 做了什么、有什么用、为什么
7. GATE: 用户确认后进入下一阶段，否则回到相应步骤调整

testRequirements.backend: 每个端点至少覆盖: 正常200响应、认证401、参数错误400、资源不存在404
testRequirements.frontend: 每个组件/页面至少覆盖: 正常渲染、加载态、空状态、错误态
testRequirements.integration: 每个端点的 e2e 路径: HTTP 请求 → handler → store 操作 → 响应 JSON → 状态码

phaseReportTemplate.what: 本阶段完成了什么（具体改动清单）
phaseReportTemplate.use: 这些改动有什么用（对用户/对系统的价值）
phaseReportTemplate.why: 为什么这样做（技术决策理由、与其他方案的权衡）
phaseReportTemplate.tests: 测试覆盖情况（测试数量、覆盖的场景类型）
phaseReportTemplate.issues: 遇到的问题及解决方法

perPhase.rollbackRule: 若阶段内无法在合理时间内让测试变绿，回退到上一阶段稳定状态，分析根因后再重新开始
perPhase.greenGate: 本阶段所有测试必须 100% 通过才能进入下一阶段；不允许带着失败测试向前推进
